title: PackageAuto-AE2-style
body:
# About
This is a resource pack for [PackagedAuto](https://modrinth.com/mod/packagedauto) and its addons, which contain [PackagedAvaritia](https://modrinth.com/mod/packagedavaritia), [PackagedDraconic](https://modrinth.com/mod/packageddraconic), [PackagedExCrafting](https://modrinth.com/mod/packagedexcrafting) and [PackagedMekemicals](https://modrinth.com/mod/packagedmekemicals). The textures follow 1.21+ AE2 mod's new style.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2004bcb9c7e350f3514b82d13e2d32044ea43701.jpeg)![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c77ea31891c494a094393d847cdb98c2202a5c4.png)![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7eb776c02e1f85d4dae31f0afaa0875b66b41ac.png)![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/513c374513765ae69b4f73488c1e02e4b6ae8d5d.png)![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/865c0f6a9e4670c9cf65621e39cc6f0868548ded.png)
